scripts.clean: rm -rf node_modules/ package-lock.json .next/ && npm run clean --workspaces
scripts.build: npm run build:vercel --workspace=civics2json && npm run build --workspaces --if-present
scripts.build:vercel: npm run build:vercel --workspace=civics2json && npm run build:vercel --workspace=distractions && npm run build:vercel --workspace=questionnaire && npm run build:vercel --workspace=website
scripts.refresh: npm run clean && npm install && npm run build
scripts.refresh:website: npm run clean --workspace=website && npm install && npm run build
